pathScheme.description: Closed scheme. Asset paths are resolved relative to the pack root. Absolute schemes (http, https, file, data, blob) are forbidden by `ugc-safety.md` § External URL Ban.

kind.description: Closed asset-kind enum. New kinds require a schema change plus an amendment to `asset-policy.md` and `asset-loading.md`. Forbidden kinds (svg, font, video, html, wasm, js, mjs, cjs, ts) are rejected at schema time per `asset-policy.md` § 2.

path.description: Pack-relative path. Forbids absolute schemes, leading slashes, parent-directory escapes, and any extension outside the closed allowlist (png, webp, ogg, mp3, json). See `ugc-safety.md` § Binary Asset Validators.

sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the asset bytes. Recomputed by `npm run build:asset-index`. Mismatch at load time is fatal: pack.error.asset.integrity.

bytes.description: Optional file size hint so the loader can pre-flight quota before downloading.
